common.errorDesc: Failed to load data. Please try again.

auth.loginSubtitle: Manage and optimize your ad campaigns

optimizer.title: Optimizer Actions
optimizer.subtitle: Every automated decision, with full reasoning.
optimizer.noActionsFiltered: No actions match the current filters
optimizer.pendingNote: This action is waiting for your approval before it is applied.
optimizer.failedNote: This action was attempted but failed. No changes were made.
optimizer.skippedNote: This action was evaluated but skipped due to guardrails or cooldowns.
optimizer.rolledBackNote: This action was applied but then reversed.
optimizer.simulationBannerDesc: These are projected actions only. Nothing has been applied or saved to any campaign.
optimizer.simulationDisclaimer: Projections are estimates based on current campaign metrics and historical patterns.
optimizer.simulationEmpty: Run a simulation to see what the optimizer would do right now.
optimizer.projectedImpactUnavailable: Impact projection not available for this action type.

settings.title: Optimizer Settings
settings.subtitle: Control how the optimizer behaves for this organization.
settings.masterControlDesc: Enable the optimizer and choose how it applies changes across campaigns.
settings.optimizerEnabledDesc: When disabled, no evaluations run and no changes are made to any campaign.
settings.disabledBanner: The optimizer is disabled. Enable it above to put these settings into effect.
settings.modeOffDesc: Optimizer is completely inactive. No evaluations, no pending actions, no changes.
settings.modeSuggestOnlyDesc: Optimizer evaluates campaigns and creates pending actions. A human must approve each one before anything changes.
settings.modeAutoApplyDesc: Optimizer automatically applies changes without approval.
settings.modeAutoApplyWarning: Changes apply without human review. Ensure your guardrails are set correctly before enabling.
settings.budgetGuardrailsDesc: Maximum budget change allowed in a single optimizer cycle. Prevents drastic single-step jumps.
settings.maxBudgetIncreaseDesc: e.g. 30 means a SAR 1,000 budget can become at most SAR 1,300 in one cycle.
settings.maxBudgetDecreaseDesc: e.g. 20 means a SAR 1,000 budget can drop to at most SAR 800 in one cycle.
settings.bidGuardrailsDesc: Maximum bid floor or ceiling change per cycle. Prevents bid instability.
settings.maxBidChangeDesc: Applies to both bid floor and bid ceiling adjustments.
settings.performanceThresholdsDesc: Org-level defaults used by optimizer rules. Individual campaigns can override these in their own settings.
settings.targetRoasDesc: Campaigns below this return on ad spend trigger intervention.
settings.targetCpaDesc: Actions that would push cost-per-acquisition above this value are blocked.
settings.minImpressionsDesc: Optimizer will not act on a campaign until it has at least this many impressions.
settings.timingControlsDesc: How often the optimizer runs and how long it waits between actions on the same entity.
settings.cooldownHoursDesc: Minimum time between interventions on the same campaign or ad set.
settings.cycleIntervalDesc: How often the optimizer evaluates all active campaigns.
settings.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

campaignArchitect.title: Campaign Architect
campaignArchitect.subtitle: Plan a new campaign step by step. The wizard reasons through goal, audience, budget and creative — and produces a plan you can approve.
campaignArchitect.list_empty_desc: Use the wizard to draft your first multi-platform plan. Nothing is launched until you approve it.
campaignArchitect.wizard_subtitle: Six quick steps. You can edit and regenerate before approving.
campaignArchitect.step_basics_desc: Name your plan and pick what success looks like.
campaignArchitect.step_audience_desc: Who are you trying to reach?
campaignArchitect.step_schedule_desc: When does it run, and how much do you spend?
campaignArchitect.step_creative_desc: Tell us about the ad you'll show.
campaignArchitect.step_review_desc: Confirm everything before we generate the plan.
campaignArchitect.field_goal_help: We use this to choose objectives, bidding strategy and KPIs.
campaignArchitect.field_notes_placeholder: Anything else worth knowing about this campaign.
campaignArchitect.field_headline_placeholder: e.g. Shop the new summer collection
campaignArchitect.validation_age_range: Min age must be ≤ max age
campaignArchitect.plan_risks_none: No risks detected — you're good to go.
campaignArchitect.plan_estimated_impact_desc: Rough projection based on the plan's audience size, budget and platform benchmarks. Treat as directional, not guaranteed.
campaignArchitect.plan_blocker_note: Resolve the blockers above before approval.
campaignArchitect.plan_warning_ack: I've reviewed and accept these warnings.
campaignArchitect.regenerate_modal_desc: We'll re-run the decision engine with the same wizard answers. Existing plan items will be replaced and any warning acknowledgments will be reset.
campaignArchitect.launch_modal_desc: We'll create the campaign, ad set and ad in each selected provider as PAUSED. Nothing starts spending until you flip them on inside the platform.
campaignArchitect.launch_page_subtitle: We'll provision your campaign across the selected platforms.
campaignArchitect.launch_paused_note_desc: Nasaq Ads does not start ad delivery for you. After provisioning succeeds, switch each campaign on inside the platform when you're ready.
campaignArchitect.launch_running_desc: We're creating the campaign, ad set, creative and ad on each platform. This may take a moment.
campaignArchitect.launch_conflict_desc: Someone else may have already launched, archived, or modified this plan. We've refreshed it — review the current status before continuing.
campaignArchitect.launched_subtitle_partial: Provisioned with some failures. Review the items below.
campaignArchitect.plan_not_found_desc: It may have been removed or you don't have access.

errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page

providerConfigs.title: Provider Configs
providerConfigs.subtitle: OAuth + API credentials for each ad platform. Credentials are encrypted at rest and never returned over the wire.
providerConfigs.safetyBanner: Changing these affects every organization on this instance. OAuth flows already in progress will be invalidated when secrets are rotated.

forbidden.title: System admin access required
forbidden.body: This page is restricted to users with the system_admin role.

summary.notConfiguredBody: Register this redirect URI in the platform's developer console, then click Configure to enter the credentials.
summary.redirectMismatchHint: The stored redirect URI does not match the expected production URL: {url}
summary.toggleDescription: Disable to block all OAuth start and token refresh for this platform.

isEnabled.label: Enabled
isEnabled.description: Disable to block OAuth start and refresh without losing the stored values.

redirectUri.label: Redirect URI
redirectUri.hint: Must be HTTPS and byte-identical to what is whitelisted in the platform console. Suggested: {url}

oauthStateSecret.label: OAuth state secret
oauthStateSecret.hint: Independent secret used to HMAC-sign the OAuth state JWT. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

callback.successBody: {count, plural, =0 {No ad accounts were linked — the authenticated Snap user has no manageable accounts.} =1 {1 ad account is now linked to this organization. Tokens are encrypted at rest and will refresh automatically.} other {# ad accounts are now linked to this organization. Tokens are encrypted at rest and will refresh automatically.}}

adAccounts.title: Ad Accounts
adAccounts.subtitle: Ad accounts linked to {org}. The Campaign Architect lets you launch new campaigns into any account listed here.
adAccounts.viewerHint: Read-only access. Ask an admin to connect a new platform.
adAccounts.confirmDisconnect: Disconnect {name}? The encrypted tokens will be deleted and no further API calls will be made to this account.

connected.title: {count, plural, =0 {No connected accounts yet} =1 {1 connected account} other {# connected accounts}}
connected.empty: Once you connect a platform below, your ad accounts will appear here. The Campaign Architect needs at least one account to launch a campaign.

connect.sectionHint: Authorize Nasaq Ads to read campaign metrics and propose optimizations on your behalf. Only platforms wired into this build are listed.
connect.readyHint: Click Connect — you'll be redirected to the platform's official login.
connect.comingSoon: Configuration UI ready, OAuth handler not wired yet.

callback.successBody: {count, plural, =0 {No ad accounts were linked — the authenticated platform user has no manageable accounts.} =1 {1 ad account is now linked. Tokens are encrypted at rest and refresh automatically.} other {# ad accounts are now linked. Tokens are encrypted at rest and refresh automatically.}}

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Users with access to {org}.
members.confirmRemove: Remove {email} from this organization? They will lose access immediately.

toast.createdNew: {email} added — a new user account was created with the password you set.

invite.title: Invite a new member
invite.name: Name (optional)
invite.namePlaceholder: How they should appear in the UI
invite.setPasswordHint: Required when this email has never signed in. You'll share the password with them manually.

roleHint.ADMIN: Full control inside this org: providers, optimizer, members, settings.
roleHint.MEMBER: Campaign manager — can view dashboards, manage campaigns, sync ad accounts. Cannot manage members or change org settings.
roleHint.VIEWER: Read-only access to dashboards and campaigns. No mutations.
